name: Park Royal
types: Food manufacturing, logistics, light industrial, creative
anchor_tenants: Diageo, Coca-Cola, Sky, Disney, British Airways
food_access: FOOD DESERT. 12 outlets for 52,000 workers (1:4,333). Deep interior has 3 outlets only. Zero food on Minerva Rd, Twyford Abbey area.
notes: SCOUT VERIFIED. Largest industrial estate in London. 500+ food manufacturers = shift workers. 3 outlets serve entire interior. Best vending opportunity.

name: Manor Royal
anchor_tenants: Virgin Atlantic, Thales, Tesco.com, Nestle, Elekta
food_access: PARTIAL desert. 16 outlets for 30,000 workers (1:1,875). 3 are snack vans. Gatwick Rd strip has coverage, western half has nothing.
notes: SCOUT VERIFIED. UK largest industrial BID. Gatwick Rd corridor has Subway, Starbucks, M&S. But western/southern areas 15-20 min from food.

name: Slough Trading Estate
types: Logistics, offices, light manufacturing, R&D, data centres
food_access: NOT a food desert. 20 outlets inc Lidl, Iceland, 3 Greggs. Bordered by residential retail on Bath Rd + Farnham Rd.
notes: SCOUT VERIFIED. Downgraded — adequate food coverage. Workers within 10 min walk of Greggs/Lidl/M&S. Vending still viable in deep interior but less urgent.

name: Brimsdown Industrial Estate
food_access: PARTIAL desert. 7 outlets for 7,500 workers (1:1,071). Western half (Lockfield Ave, Brancroft Way) has zero food. 1 Greggs on Millmarsh Ln.
notes: SCOUT VERIFIED. London 2nd largest estate. Western interior is pure food desert. Green St edge has some options but long walk from interior.

name: DP World London Gateway
food_access: FOOD DESERT. 3 outlets on 1,500 acres. 1 warehouse cafe, 1 bistro, 1 Esso. Stanford-le-Hope 3 miles away. Car-dependent.
notes: SCOUT VERIFIED. Extremely isolated. 24/7 port ops. No Greggs, no supermarket, no chains. Nearest proper shops 3 miles. Growing workforce.

name: Crossways Business Park
types: Logistics, distribution, data centres, food distribution
anchor_tenants: John Lewis, Kuehne+Nagel, ASDA, DHL, Yodel
food_access: PARTIAL desert. 3 outlets in park (Costa + 2 restaurants). No grab-and-go beyond Costa. Stone village shops 10-15 min walk.
notes: SCOUT VERIFIED. Costa only quick food option. Restaurants serve sit-down meals not shift worker snacks. Stone village walkable but slow.

name: Prologis Park West London
food_access: Zero on-site. 15 min walk to West Drayton station.
notes: Large logistics warehouses with shift workers. Approach individual occupiers.

name: Watford Business Park
food_access: PARTIAL desert on-site. 2 outlets (Greggs + Seven Seeded). Whippendell Rd shops ~10 min walk with Tesco Express, SPAR.
notes: SCOUT VERIFIED. Very thin on-site provision but smaller estate rescued by proximity to residential retail. On-site vending still valuable.

name: SEGRO Greenford Central
food_access: Some high street nearby. Estate itself is industrial.

name: Thames Road / Erith-Belvedere Corridor
food_access: Limited. Scattered convenience in residential areas.
notes: Dense industrial strip. Multiple estates along Thames Road.

name: Beddington Trading Estate
food_access: Purley Way retail 0.5 miles but not walkable (industrial roads).
notes: Workers unlikely to walk to Purley Way during breaks.

name: Stockley Park
anchor_tenants: Apple, GSK, Canon, Hasbro, Marks & Spencer
food_access: On-park amenities at The Square. Premium managed campus.
notes: Premium campus — likely has catering. Opportunity in buildings without canteens. Requires healthy/premium product mix.

name: Croxley Park
food_access: Not walkable to town. Shuttle bus to Watford Junction.
notes: Managed campus. Check what on-site catering exists.
